# Shelterwood AI

> Shelterwood AI Inc. is a software company in Toronto, Canada. It builds and
> runs a growing portfolio of small, AI-native software businesses, and runs
> the company on an AI-native operating model: an AI system named Silas does
> most of the building and day-to-day work, while people set direction and hold
> the decisions that matter. The flagship is Cuesheet, a co-instructor for
> indoor-cycling classes (iPhone and iPad). Founded by Peter Cresswell, a
> Waterloo-trained professional engineer (P.Eng) with a background in
> healthcare technology.

## Pages

- [About](https://shelterwood.ai/about/): The company, its approach, and the founder.
- [Portfolio](https://shelterwood.ai/portfolio/): The portfolio of businesses, Cuesheet first.
- [Cuesheet](https://shelterwood.ai/portfolio/cuesheet/): The flagship app for indoor-cycling instructors.
- [Approach](https://shelterwood.ai/approach/): How we build — the AI-native operating model and Silas.
- [Contact](https://shelterwood.ai/contact/): How to reach Shelterwood AI Inc.
- [Privacy](https://shelterwood.ai/privacy/): Company-wide privacy policy.
- [Cuesheet privacy](https://shelterwood.ai/portfolio/cuesheet/privacy/): The Cuesheet app privacy policy.

## Key Facts

- Incorporated in Canada as Shelterwood AI Inc.
- Registered office: 500 Richmond St W, Suite 126, Toronto, Ontario, Canada
- Operating model: AI-native; an AI system named Silas builds and runs the portfolio, with people holding the gates that matter.
- Portfolio: a growing set of small software businesses, Cuesheet first.
- Flagship product: Cuesheet (cuesheet.ca)
- Founded: 2026
- Contact: peter.cresswell@shelterwood.ai
